revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:1-ngie̍t 15-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:1月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 15일]][[wuu:正月十五]][[za:Ndwencieng ngoenz cib haj]][[zh-classical:正月十五]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月十五]][[zh:正月十五]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 15|qq=January 15}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 15''' is the 15th day of the month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}}, the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Seinei|en|Emperor Seinei|qid=Q357273|lt=Emperor Seinei|1=Emperor Seinei}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|480|en|480|qid=Q30329|lt=480|1=480}} {{ill|February 11|en|February 11|qid=Q2335|lt=February 11|1=February 11}}） – The 22nd Emperor, [[:en:Seinei|Seinei]], ascends to the throne. * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|en|Empress Kōgyoku|qid=Q235296|lt=Empress Kōgyoku|1=Empress Kōgyoku}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|642|en|642|qid=Q30872|lt=642|1=642}} {{ill|February 19|en|February 19|qid=Q2340|lt=February 19|1=February 19}}） – Princess Takara, consort of {{ill|Emperor Jomei|en|Emperor Jomei|qid=Q329761|lt=Emperor Jomei|1=Emperor Jomei}}, ascends as the 35th monarch, {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|en|Empress Kōgyoku|qid=Q235296|lt=Empress Kōgyoku|1=Empress Kōgyoku}}. * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1193910}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1778|en|1778|qid=Q7713|lt=1778|1=1778}} {{ill|February 18|en|February 18|qid=Q2343|lt=February 18|1=February 18}}） – {{ill|Tanuma Okitsugu|en|Tanuma Okitsugu|qid=Q521070|lt=Tanuma Okitsugu|1=Tanuma Okitsugu}} appointed as {{ill|Rōjū|en|Rōjū|qid=Q1196812|lt=Rōjū|1=Rōjū}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|qid=Q7698|lt=1862|1=1862}} {{ill|February 13|en|February 13|qid=Q2333|lt=February 13|1=February 13}}） – [[Sakashita Gate Incident]]: {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|en|Andō Nobumasa|qid=Q3208958|lt=Andō Nobumasa|1=Andō Nobumasa}}, a key figure in Princess [[:en:Kazunomiya|Kazunomiya]]’s marriage, is attacked by Mito Domain samurai. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|February 8|en|February 8|qid=Q2323|lt=February 8|1=February 8}}） – The {{ill|Government of Meiji Japan|en|Government of Meiji Japan|qid=Q1322181|lt=Government of Meiji Japan|1=Government of Meiji Japan}} formally announces the [[Restoration of Imperial Rule]] to foreign embassies.
== Births == * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1193910}} 7th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1778|en|1778|qid=Q7713|lt=1778|1=1778}} {{ill|February 11|en|February 11|qid=Q2335|lt=February 11|1=February 11}}） – {{ill|帆足万里|ja|帆足万里|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/帆足万里|1=Hoashi Banri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6564584}}, Confucian scholar and reformist (d. {{ill|1852|en|1852|qid=Q7661|lt=1852|1=1852}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 15th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1844|en|1844|qid=Q7633|lt=1844|1=1844}} {{ill|March 3|en|March 3|qid=Q2391|lt=March 3|1=March 3}}） – {{ill|Aoki Shūzō|en|Aoki Shūzō|qid=Q615728|lt=Aoki Shūzō|1=Aoki Shūzō}}, diplomat and politician (d. {{ill|1914|en|1914|qid=Q2083|lt=1914|1=1914}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} {{ill|February 28|en|February 28|qid=Q2362|lt=February 28|1=February 28}}） – {{ill|Motoda Hajime|en|Motoda Hajime|qid=Q11387972|lt=Motoda Hajime|1=Motoda Hajime}}, politician, Speaker of the House of Representatives (d. {{ill|1938|en|1938|qid=Q18645|lt=1938|1=1938}}). * [[Meiji]] 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|February 23|en|February 23|qid=Q2352|lt=February 23|1=February 23}}） – {{ill|Hirakushi Denchū|en|Hirakushi Denchū|qid=Q11483145|lt=Hirakushi Denchū|1=Hirakushi Denchū}}, sculptor (d. {{ill|1979|en|1979|qid=Q2484|lt=1979|1=1979}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ninpei|en|Ninpei|qid=Q1193887|lt=Ninpei|1=Ninpei}} 3rd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1153|en|1153|qid=Q19646|lt=1153|1=1153}} {{ill|February 10|en|February 10|qid=Q2325|lt=February 10|1=February 10}}） – {{ill|Taira no Tadamori|en|Taira no Tadamori|qid=Q3083805|lt=Taira no Tadamori|1=Taira no Tadamori}}, military leader, father of [[Taira no Kiyomori]] (b. {{ill|1096|en|1096|qid=Q19485|lt=1096|1=1096}}). * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|qid=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 24th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1417|en|1417|qid=Q6193|lt=1417|1=1417}} {{ill|February 1|en|February 1|qid=Q2312|lt=February 1|1=February 1}}） – {{ill|Reizei Tametoshi|ja|冷泉為尹|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reizei Tametoshi|1=Reizei Tamemasa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11395353}}, waka poet (b. {{ill|1361|en|1361|qid=Q6159|lt=1361|1=1361}}).
== Commemorations == * {{ill|First Full Moon Festival|en|First Full Moon Festival|qid=Q13423452|lt=Koshōgatsu|1=First Full Moon Festival}} (Minor New Year) * {{ill|Jōgen (festival)|ja|上元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōgen (festival)|1=Q124344147|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q124344147}} (First Full Moon Festival)
== Fictional Events == === Fictional Births === * {{ill|Zhenguan|en|Zhenguan|qid=Q3577278|lt=Jōgan|1=Zhenguan}} 18th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|876|en|876|qid=Q23815|lt=876|1=876}} {{ill|February 13|en|February 13|qid=Q2333|lt=February 13|1=February 13}}） – {{nihongo|Ōya no Yotsugi|大宅世継|qq=}}, fictional chronicler from *{{ill|Ōkagami|en|Ōkagami|qid=Q385120|lt=Ōkagami|1=Ōkagami}}*.<ref>『大鏡』「序」より。</ref>
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|14|1|16|12|15|2|1|0115|qq=}}
== References == {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 1월 15일]] [[ja:1月15日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:正月十五]]
[[ar:January 15 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[hak:1-ngie̍t 15-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]] [[wuu:正月十五]] [[za:Ndwencieng ngoenz cib haj]] [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月十五]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[hak:1-ngie̍t 15-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]] [[wuu:正月十五]] [[za:Ndwencieng ngoenz cib haj]] [[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:正月十五]] {{wikidata link|Q838395}} [[Category:Days 15 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar January]] [[Category:Senbu]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
